summary: Completed comprehensive testing of task management system with new features: report viewing, task editing, and task completion with reports. All major functionality working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 when trying to create duplicate employee username

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with proper statistics (3 total tasks, 1 pending, 2 completed)
Task creation and assignment to employees
Task completion with success reports via POST /api/tasks/{task_id}/complete
View report button opens modal showing task details and reports
Edit task button opens modal with editable form fields
